title: Insuretch Anlaysis - Roopak

source.file: input_data/corpus/20200803 PC-Strategy-Solution Development and GoToMarket PlanVer1.5.xlsx

grain: one row per value-chain sub-function, describing capability gaps and the kind/need for a partner plus candidate partner companies
summary: A partnership-gap analysis across the insurance value chain: for each value-chain sub-function (grouped under high-level areas like New Business & Underwriting, Policy Servicing, Claim Operations) it records gaps in operational capabilities, digital solutions, ready-to-deploy analytics, and platform, then states the kind of partner required, the need for that partner, and candidate partner companies. Use it to see, per value-chain area, what capability gaps exist and which external partners could fill them.
use_cases: For a given value-chain sub-function, what capability gaps exist (operational, digital, analytics, platform)?
What kind of partner is required and why for each value-chain area?
Which candidate partner companies are suggested for each value-chain function?

columns.name: Value Chain
columns.note: high-level value-chain group; populated only on group lead rows

columns.name: Unnamed: 2
columns.note: value-chain sub-function (unlabeled header column); the row-level identifier

columns.name: Gaps in ready to deploy Analytics Algorithms

Potential Partners 
(need more research…work in progress)
columns.note: candidate partner companies; often multi-valued free text

examples.Gaps in Operational Capabilities: - Experience of managing Underwriter Technician roles - Absence of a strong case study related to UW role optimization
examples.Need for Partner: To support new product launches and design back office operations to support digital insurance
Onshore claim processing, access to provider and peer networks, UR and/or membership functions
examples.Potential Partners \n(need more research: TPAs- Crawford, Broadspire, Gallagher Bassett, Sedgwick, York; Peer Networks- Genex Services, EK Health, Unimed Direct

not_answerable.q: How are the candidate partners ranked or rated?
What are the financial terms or deal values for the partnerships?

not_answerable.reason: only candidate partners are listed (marked work in progress)

warnings: title banner in row 2; header at row 4 with a blank spacer row (row 5) dropped via two-row handling
profiler mis-detected header_row (12) and only 1 data row; corrected to header_row 4 with ~9 data rows
'Value Chain' populated only on group lead rows; the row-level function is the unlabeled 'Unnamed: 2' column
'Potential Partners' cells are multi-valued free text (multiple companies per cell)
